events.title: Cotton, Cane, and the New South
events.scene: The South is rebuilding itself on cotton, cane, timber, and the cheap labor that works them — a region of old hierarchies and new money jostling in the humid heat. The {surname} line can plant itself in the land and its crops, bring in the mills and factories the boosters promise, or trade across the river-delta network that moves the South's wealth to the world.
events.researchNote: Place-specific Southern origins beat (EX-2): the post-Reconstruction 'New South' — plantation agriculture, industrialization, and delta trade. Generic to any american_south founding.

choices.text: Build a great agricultural estate on the region's old model
choices.outcome: You build on land and crop the way the old families did. The {surname} name takes its place among the region's gentry, with all that entails.

choices.text: Bring in the mills and factories — be the New South they promise
choices.outcome: You build smokestacks where others see only fields. The {surname} line becomes the face of a South remaking itself, for better and worse.

choices.text: Trade across the river-delta network that moves the South's wealth
choices.outcome: You learn every landing and broker on the river. The {surname} line takes a cut of the cotton and cane flowing to the wider world.

events.title: The Weight of an Old Order
events.scene: The South's prosperity rests on a brutal, codified hierarchy, and the {surname} line cannot pretend otherwise. To rise here is to decide how the family stands in relation to that order — enforcing it for profit and standing, quietly working around it, or paying the steep price of defying it.
events.researchNote: The Jim Crow caste system as the inescapable moral architecture of a Southern founding — a place-specific choice that sets durable reputation/pole flags.

choices.text: Profit within the order and let it lift the {surname} name
choices.outcome: You take the standing the order offers those who uphold it. The {surname} line prospers on a foundation it does not examine too closely.

choices.text: Pay the price of standing against the caste, however quietly
choices.outcome: You work against the grain at real cost. The {surname} name earns a harder, rarer kind of respect — and dangerous enemies.
